text-align: center; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
📄 {uid}
uid : string (PK)
email : string
name : string
phone : string
city : string
country : string
bloodGroup : string
isDonor : boolean
profileCompleted : boolean
profileImage : string (URL)
about : string
fcmToken : string
dismissedRequests : array<string>
createdAt : timestamp

div.style: font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
text-align: center; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px;

span.p:
📄 {notificationId}
id : string (PK)
title : string
body : string
type : string
isRead : boolean
createdAt : timestamp

span.p:
📄 {requestId}
id : string (PK)

bags : number
hospital : string

phone : string
city : string
country : string
status : string (open/closed)
createdAt : timestamp
expiryDate : timestamp

updatedAt : timestamp
